Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain
Open-drain review support using normalized STID/P&ID and optional tagreader evidence.

The package evaluates NORSOK S-001 Clause 9 requirements without connecting directly to STID, document-management systems, or plant historians. External workflows normalize evidence into JSON, while OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator can derive process liquid leak rates, liquid density, pressure, fire-water load, and drain capacity from NeqSim streams and process equipment.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

    Description
    neqsim.process.safety
     
  • Class
    Description
    OpenDrainAssessment
    One requirement-level assessment in an open-drain review.
    OpenDrainAssessment.Status
    Assessment status values used in report output.
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator
    Builds open-drain review evidence directly from NeqSim process and thermodynamic objects.
    OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis
    Design and safeguard basis for converting NeqSim process evidence into open-drain evidence.
    OpenDrainReviewDataSource
    Source adapter for normalized open-drain review inputs.
    OpenDrainReviewEngine
    Deterministic NORSOK S-001 Clause 9 review engine for open-drain systems.
    OpenDrainReviewInput
    Normalized input for an open-drain review against NORSOK S-001 Clause 9.
    OpenDrainReviewItem
    One area, drain system, bunded equipment group, or STID-derived item in an open-drain review.
    OpenDrainReviewReport
    Aggregated report for an open-drain review.
    OpenDrainReviewResult
    Review result for one open-drain area or drain system.
    StidOpenDrainDataSource
    Normalized STID/P&ID and tagreader JSON bridge for the open-drain review engine.
